title: stevia punctata
intro: Stevia punctata, also known as the Prickly Stevia or Stevia, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to South America. The medicinal properties of Stevia punctata include its ability to act as a natural sweetener, antimicrobial agent, and anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Stevia punctata include its potential to aid in weight loss, lower blood pressure, and improve insulin sensitivity. Stevia punctata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
